type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Used emission factors from the updated USEPA document, Emission Factors & AP 42 (Fifth Edition). Volume 1: Stationary Point and Area Sources, Chapter 3.2 "Natural Gas-fired Reciprocating Engines" dated October 2024. Emission factors for a 4-stroke lean burning engine were used for the cogeneration unit.
